provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the Provincial and District Boundaries Act.

provisions.title: Division of Zambia into Provinces and Districts
provisions.content: The President may, by statutory order, divide Zambia into such Provinces and divide the Provinces into such Districts, as may be convenient for the purposes of administration, describing the boundaries thereof and assigning names thereto.
